title: Redis Cluster Node Failure Causing Recommendation API Timeout
description: Recommendation API p99 latency spiked to 2340ms. Root cause traced to redis-cluster-03 node failure.
root_cause: Redis cluster node redis-cluster-03 (10.0.1.52) experienced OOM kill due to memory leak in Lua script execution. Connection pool was exhausted (50/50).
solution:
1. Restarted redis-cluster-03 node
2. Increased maxmemory from 4GB to 8GB
3. Fixed Lua script memory leak
4. Added connection pool monitoring alert

events.content: DevOps-MAS analyzed logs and identified redis-cluster-03 as the failing node
Root cause: OOM kill on redis-cluster-03 due to Lua script memory leak
Node restarted, maxmemory increased, Lua script fixed
